---
title: Scientific Talks and Posters
excertp: "A list of selected talks I have given"
toc-location: right
page-layout: full
---

## Upcoming presentations:

-   International Conference on Multilevel Analysis, Utrecht, Netherlands. Contributed Talk: *Intuitive Joint Priors for Bayesian Multilevel Models*.

-   ISBA World Meeting 2024. Venice, Italy. Poster: *Generalized Decomposition priors on R2.*

## Past presentations:

-   NordStat 2023. Gothenburg, Sweden. Contributed Talk: *Intuitive Joint Priors for Bayesian Multilevel Models*.

-   BayesComp 2023. Levi, Finland. Poster: *Intuitive Joint Priors for Bayesian Multilevel Models*.

-   German Probability and Statistics Days (GPSD). Essen, Germany. Contributed Talk: *Intuitive Joint Priors for Bayesian Multilevel Models*.

-   International Conference on Statistics and Data Science (ICSDS) 2022, Florence, Italy 2022. Invited Talk: *Intuitive Joint Priors for Bayesian Multilevel Models*. [Student travel award](https://imstat.org/2022/12/06/2022-icsds-travel-award-recipients/) given by the IMS.
